title: Section 135
content: (1) The State Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, make one or more schemes to provide for-- (a) an in depth study on causes and analysis of motor vehicle accidents; (b) wayside amenities on highways; (c) traffic aid posts on highways; 1*** (d) truck parking complexes along 2[highways; and]. 3[(e) any other amenities in the interests of the safety and the convenience of the public.] (2) Every scheme made under this section by any State Government shall be laid, as soon as may be after it is made, before the State Legislature. 3[(3) The Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, make one or more schemes to conduct in-depth studies on the causes and analysis of road accidents.]
footnote: 1. The word “and” omitted by Act 32 of 2019, s. 46 (w.e.f. 1-9-2019). 2. Subs. by s. 46, ibid., for 'highways" (w.e.f. 1-9-2019). 3. Ins. by s. 46, ibid. (w.e.f. 1-9-2019).
